description: Manifest of stdio JSON-RPC fixture scenarios for MCP compliance testing. All scenarios are language-agnostic JSON files consumable by both TypeScript (Vitest) and Python (pytest) test suites.
framing_rule: Each wire_line in a scenario is newline-delimited JSON (append '\n' before writing to stdin). No Content-Length headers are used.

scenarios.description: Post-init lifecycle notification; no response expected
List available tools; result.tools must be a non-empty array
Valid tool invocation; result.content must be an array
Unparseable wire line; server must return error code -32700
Valid JSON but missing jsonrpc/id fields; server must return error code -32600
Unknown method on a valid envelope; server must return error code -32601

assertion_ops.eq: Exact equality between actual value and assertion.value
assertion_ops.eq_input_id: Actual value must equal the id from the corresponding input request
assertion_ops.exists: Path must be present in the response object
assertion_ops.not_exists: Path must be absent from the response object
assertion_ops.typeof: Actual value must match assertion.value type string ('string', 'number', 'boolean', 'object', 'array')
assertion_ops.length_gte: Actual array must have length >= assertion.value
